date_text: Thu, Mar 26th • 12:00 PM AEDT - Sun, Mar 29th • 10:00 PM AEDT
description: White Bay Brewery is taking over the taps at Hotel Sweeneys Rooftop! One of our favourite breweries, White Bay beers are great representations of style: fresh, balanced, and impossible to resist. These kegs wont last long, so get in quick and grab a pint. See you on the rooftop! Tap List:- - Czech Pilsner - Hazy Pale Ale - XPA - Munich Lager - Main Character WCIPA - Plot Twist Black IPA - Steelworked WCPILS - Dolce Noir - Vinum Sabbathi Imperial Stout - Dog Days Red IPA - Trifecta Hazy IPA - King Peanut Fresh Hop Golden Ale
